tasks.title: frontend/ scaffold: Vite+React+TS+Tailwind+shadcn, generated OpenAPI client, TanStack Query, SSE client, a11y baseline, fail-safe guarded state

scenarios: The console builds its API layer only from the generated OpenAPI client
A dropped SSE stream shows a disconnected indicator and reconnects
Interactive console components conform to WAI-ARIA
The console never enforces a safety decision client-side
An API error renders the restrictive state

tasks.title: Read-only-to-operational mode: mutation_enabled + per-caller capability gating

scenarios: In read-only mode the console exposes no mutating control
When mutation is enabled an authorized operator gains operational controls

tasks.title: Approval console panel: pending-decision feed, RBAC-gated approve/veto/handoff with server re-check

scenarios: The approval console shows the plan, prediction, and reversibility signals for a pending decision
An approver action is gated by role and re-checked server-side
A non-approver cannot act on a pending decision

tasks.title: ActionManifest timeline + replay: one visual chain keyed by action_id, reconstruction-not-re-run

scenarios: The ActionManifest timeline renders one chain keyed by the action id
Replaying a completed manifest reconstructs the chain without re-executing

tasks.title: Tamper-evident ledger view: server-computed chain-verification status surfaced verbatim

scenarios: The ledger view surfaces the server-computed chain verification status
A broken ledger chain is shown as tamper-detected

tasks.title: Explainability panel: retrieval context, banding signals, execution class, confidence trajectory, tool-result evidence

scenarios: The explainability panel shows the banding signals, execution class, and tool-result evidence

tasks.title: Autonomy-band + per-layer kill-switch controls: policy-API writes, RBAC-gated, audited, confirm-before-disable

scenarios: Autonomy-band and kill-switch controls call the policy API and are RBAC-gated
A kill-switch reflects the disabled state only after the API confirms it

tasks.title: Admin panel: users, RBAC role assignments, on-call rotation/escalation, per-module enablement

scenarios: The admin panel manages users, roles, on-call, and modules
